meaning: n.食人肉的人,食人肉的动物(一般以复数形式出现)
examples: Objective To compare the effects of colony oviposition and single tube oviposition for improving the reproductive rate of Anopheles anthropophagus .
The polypeptide patterns of the eggs of Anopheles sinensis and An. anthropophagus were compared with two-dimensional electrophoresis in polyacrylamide gel.
Anopheles sinensis were captured in malaria vector surveillance sites and no Anopheles anthropophagus was found. 340 bed nets were impregnated with Cyfluthrin in a local outbreak site.
